com.newland.nsdk.core.api.external.setting

Class ExtSettings

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.newland.nsdk.core.api.external.setting.ExtSettings

  • public class ExtSettings
extends java.lang.Object
    The keys of external setting items.

    • Field Summary

      Fields 
      Modifier and Type Field and Description
      static java.lang.String PERSIST_SYS_AUTORUN
      Application autorun "0": disable "1": enable
      static java.lang.String PERSIST_SYS_BACKLIGHT_ONOFF
      set backlight onoff "0": off "1": on "2": lock on
      static java.lang.String PERSIST_SYS_BRIGHTNESS
      Brightness
      static java.lang.String PERSIST_SYS_COMM_PRIORITY
      Set Comm priority(Write-only)
      static java.lang.String PERSIST_SYS_DATE_FORMAT
      The date format to be set(Write-only)
      static java.lang.String PERSIST_SYS_KEY_BACKLIGHT
      Key BackLight
      static java.lang.String PERSIST_SYS_KEYVOL
      key volume "0": disable "1": enable
      static java.lang.String PERSIST_SYS_LANGUAGE
      system language "0": English "1": Chinese
      static java.lang.String PERSIST_SYS_NET_AUTOCONNTYPE
      The type of auto-connect network to be set(Write-only)
      static java.lang.String PERSIST_SYS_PING_DISABLE
      Whether to disable PIN function(Write-only)
      static java.lang.String PERSIST_SYS_TIME_FORMAT
      The time format to be set(Write-only)

      Sets or Gets the device time zone.

      External device's PN (read-only)

      External device's SN (read-only)

      rfid type, for the specific return value,please refer to the below comment of the chip type.

      rfid version (read-only)

      Gets the system battery level(Read-only).

      Gets the system battery status(Read-only).

      System comm priority.
      static java.lang.String SYS_ETH_DHCP
      System ethernet DHCP
      static java.lang.String SYS_LED_COLOR
      current led color "1": single green "6": colorful

      System power mode

      • RO_RFID_TYPE

        public static final java.lang.String RO_RFID_TYPE
        rfid type, for the specific return value,please refer to the below comment of the chip type. (read-only)
        • autoscan
        • rc531
        • pn512
        • as3911
        • rc663
        • mh1608
        • fm17550
        • mh1608d
        • fm17550x
        • pn5180
        • yc5118
        • thm3070
        • none
        • no
        See Also:
        Constant Field Values

      • RO_POS_HW

        public static final java.lang.String RO_POS_HW
        hardware information, for the specific return value, please refer to the below comment of hardware. (read-only)
            val[0-1]: wireless module
          • "FF" :No wireless module
          • "02" :GPRS + MC39
          • "03" :GPRS + sim300
          • "06" :GPRS + M72
          • "07" :GPRS + BGS2
          • "08" :GPRS + G610
          • "09" :GPRS + G500
          • "10" :GPRS + M25
          • "40" :GPRS + H330
          • "43" :GPRS + EHS6
          • "64" :EC20 + C-HC
          • "65" :EC20 CE-FDLG
          • "81" :CDMA + dtgs800
          • "82" :CDMA + dtm228c
          • "83" :GPRS + AC35
          • "85" :CDMA + CE910
            val[2-3]: RF module
          • "FF" :No RF module
          • "01" :[Linux]RC531 [RTOS]RC531 [SP550]
          • "02" :[Linux]PN512 [RTOS]PN512 [SP550]PN512
          • "03" :[Linux]AS3911 [RTOS]AS3911 [SP550]AS3911
          • "04" :[Linux]RC663 [RTOS]RC663 [SP550]RC663
          • "05" :[Linux]MH1608 [RTOS]MH1608 [SP550]MH1608
          • "06" :[Linux]FM17550 [RTOS]FM17550 [SP550]FM17550
          • "07" :[Linux]PN5180 [RTOS]MH1608D [SP550]MH1608D
          • "08" :[Linux]ST3916 [RTOS]FM17550X [SP550]FM17550X
          • "09" :[Linux]FM17660 [RTOS]PN5180 [SP550]
          • "0A" : [RTOS]YC5118 [SP550]YC5118
          • "0B" : [SP550]YC5018
          • "0C" : [SP550]FM17660
          • "0D" : [SP550]ST3916
            val[4-5]: magnetic card module
          • "FF" :No magnetic card module
          • "01" :mesh
          • "02" :giga
          • "03" :magtek
          • "04" :Idtech-dualmag
          • "10" :ADC soft decoding
          • "11" :GPIO
            val[6-7]: Scanning head module
          • "FF" :No magnetic card module
          • "01" :EM1300
          • "02" :EM3000
          • "03" :SE955
          • "04" :0390/UE966
          • "05" :AC35/EM3095
          • "06" :EM1365
          • "07" :E20390
          • "08" :GC0312
          • "09" :3682
          • "80" :soft decoding 0312
            val[8-9]: Whether to support external password keyboard
          • "FF" :Not supported
          • "01" :Support
            val[10-11]: Number of serial ports
          • "FF" :None
          • "01" :1
          • "02" :2
            val[12-13]: Whether to support USB
          • "FF" :No
          • "01" :yes
            val[14-15]: MODEM module
          • "FF" :No
          • "01" :yes
            val[16-17]: wifi module
          • "FF" :No wifi module
          • "01" :USI WM-G-MR-09
          • "02" :ESP8266
          • "03" :AP6181
          • "04" :Ap6212
          • "05" :AP5236
          • "06" :AP6256
          • "07" :rtl8821
          • "08" :bk7213s
            val[18-19]: Whether to support Ethernet
          • "FF" :No
          • "01" :dm9000
          • "02" :bcm589xcore
            val[20-21]: print module
          • "FF": No print module
          • "01"~"7F": thermal sensitive
          • "82"~"FE": Stitching
            val[22-23]: Whether to support touch screen
          • "FF" :No
          • "01" :ts_2046
          • "02" :589x_ts
          • "03" :touch_screen
          • "82" :GT5688
            val[24-25]: RF LED lamp
          • "FF" :No
          • "01" :Yes
            val[26-27]: Bluetooth
          • "FF" :No
          • "01" :BM77/SD8787
          • "02" :AT24/AP6210
          • "03" :AP6210B
          • "04" :ALLTEC20706/AP6212
          • "05" :YC1021/AP6236
          • "06" :TC35661/AP6255
          • "07" :20707-A2
          • "08" :YC1021S
            val[28-29]: NFC
          • "FF" :No
          • "01" :yes
            val[30-31]: national secret chip
          • "FF" :No
          • "01" :THMK88
          • "02" :CCM
            val[32-33]: MDB
          • "FF" :No
          • "01" :5830
          • "02" :stm32
          • "03" :gd32
            val[34-35]: IC
          • "FF" :No
          • "01" :
          • "02" :TDA8035
            val[36-37]: SAM
          • "FF" :No
          • "01" :
          • "02" :
            val[38-39]: Speaker
          • "FF" :No
          • "01" :
          • "02" :
            val[40-41]: SD Card
          • "FF" :No
          • "01" :
          • "02" :
            val[42-43]: external reader
          • "FF" :No
          • "01" :yes
            val[44-45]: FM
          • "FF" :No
          • "01" :
          • "02" :mh-1902
            val[46-47]: customer display
          • "FF" :No
          • "01" :yes
        See Also:
